message:
test(share,core,cli): add 83 tests for executor, intern, and golden modules

- executor.rs: 6→31 tests (+25) — all providers headers content, dry-run metadata,
  non-interactive skip, multiple steps, shell command success/failure, builder config
- intern.rs: 13→37 tests (+24) — into_arc, From conversions, unicode/emoji/empty/long
  strings, concurrent interning, pre_intern idempotency, hash collections, ordering
- golden.rs: 12→46 tests (+34) — GoldenCommandSpec builder/serde, GoldenStream serde,
  select_stream_output all variants, sha256 edge cases, normalize edge cases,
  read_checksums edge cases, build_inline_diff edge cases, error Display

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
